穏やかに見つめ合っていると、<br>騒ぐ兵士たちの声が聞こえてきた。:
As we gazed at each other peacefully, the voices of the boisterous
soldiers reached us.
ああ、まだ宴会の最中らしい。<br>賑やかなことだ。: Ah, the party's still in full swing. It's quite lively.
こっちはもうくつろいでいるというのに、<br>こんな場所で抜け駆けしてしまったな:
We're already relaxing, and yet we've sneaked away to a spot like
this.
……むしろここを選んだのは良かったかもしれないな。<br>基地の中では、あの騒ぎ:
... Actually, choosing this spot was probably for the best. Inside the
base, we couldn't have calmed down with all that commotion.
また宴会があったら、ここに来ようか。<br>こうして、２人で祝勝会をしよう。:
If there's another party, let's come here. We'll have our own victory
party, just the two of us.
……ああ、そうしよう。<br>楽しみにしている、司令官。: ... Ah, let's do that. I'll be looking forward to it, Commander.
微笑み合い、互いの身を寄せ合う。<br>焚き火の暖かさと彼女の温かさに、心が１つ:
We smiled at each other and drew close. The warmth of the campfire
and her warmth—it was a night where our hearts melted into one.
